---
title: "Yuxi Jin"

image: images/photo-yuxi.jpg
about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 15em
---

I am a Ph.D. candidate and a researcher in quantitative marketing at Goethe University Frankfurt.

My research examines how privacy regulation reshapes data driven markets. I focus on how firms adapt their data practices and user communication, and how these responses affect users, firms, and competition in online advertising.

<br/>

## **Publications**

|  |
|------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| **The Impact of the General Data Protection Regulation on the Online Advertising Market**, with Bernd Skiera, Klaus Miller, Lennart Kraft, René Laub, and Julia Schmitt |
| [Softcover & Kindle eBook](https://www.amazon.de/Impact-General-Protection-Regulation-Advertising/dp/3982417309?language=en_GB&currency=EUR) \| [Interactive PDF](http://www.leanpub.com/gdpr-impact) \| [Free Web Version](http://www.gdpr-impact.com/) |
| Media coverage by [Forbes](https://www.forbes.com/sites/hecparis/2022/03/17/business-leaders-should-learn-from-facebooks-decline-it-points-to-new-consumer-responses-to-data-advertising-and-privacy/?sh=11314bc3344d). |

|  |
|------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| **How Do Privacy Laws Impact the Value for Advertisers, Publishers and Users in the Online Advertising Market? A Comparison of the EU, US and China**, with Bernd Skiera, *Journal of Creating Value,* 2022, 8(2), 306-327. |
| [PDF](https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/epdf/10.1177/23949643221117676) \| [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1177/23949643221117676) |

<br/>

## **Working in Progress**

|  |
|------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| **How Does Standardized Permission for Personal Data Processing Affect Online Tracking? An Analysis of the Impact of Transparency and Consent Framework (TCF)**, with Bernd Skiera. |

|                                                                       |
|-----------------------------------------------------------------------|
| **Monetization and Privacy Policy Design: Evidence from Mobile Apps** |

|  |
|------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| **Mapping Third-party Tracking in the Web**, with Maximilian Matthe and Bernd Skiera. |

<br/>

## **Funding**

All projects have received funding from the European Research Council (ERC) under the European Union's Horizon 2020 research and innovation program (grant agreement No. 833714).
